intake.clarifying_skip_rationale: Source directive enumerates five required-execution sections, ten acceptance criteria, five operator manual-validation actions, and three explicit non-goals. The intake-analyst surfaces remaining latitude as `## Plan-stage decisions required` rather than as open intake questions.
intake.human_approval_request_note: Operator ratification is required because the Feature drives the Phase 4 bootstrap exit gate and touches `tesseract.yaml`, the inbox lifecycle, and the dogfood proof bundle that gates Phase 5 M1 backlog work.

metadata.scaffold_note: Intake-analyst created the spec and the per-feature index scaffold only. Librarian populates the full index at post_run after the run reaches the index and complete stages.
